analytic_flops.note: per-layer and MTP (B=1) Megatron-convention FLOPs at capture seq; site multiplies by GA x DP

provenance.note: cr in graphed_crs_estimated_from_cr4 were CUDA-graph/stream-captured (compute not visible in trace); their breakdown is copied from cr=4 as an estimate. Re-run those cr with graph capture disabled for exact numbers. dropped_stall_us_per_mb: per-mb layer-compute kernel time dropped as implausible one-off device stalls (> _MAX_PLAUSIBLE_LAUNCH_US).

measured_anchor.config: PP8/VPP1/EP8/TP1, world 64, MBS1/GBS128, seq4096, full recompute, layout Et*4|t*5|(t*6|)*5,t*4mL (8-node MI355X)

kernels.name: void at::native::vectorized_gather_kernel<16, long>(char*, char*, long*, int, lo

optimizer.note: Adam mixed-precision step traffic in bytes/param; measured one-layer optimizer-step kernel time is a sanity reference

comm.note: EP dispatch/combine are memory_bound rows inside moe; informational
